what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for an image asset named p-10 in the design-source channel; it documents a source design ground-truth JPEG for a presentation slide.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains asset metadata: id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, source, author_session, created, and links.
Width and height are both set to 0.
The body text states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — presentation-15p/p-10.jpg'.
standouts: It is explicitly labeled as a design ground-truth source asset.
Image dimensions are recorded as 0 despite being an image file.
It uses a blob URI to locate the actual binary content.
conventions: Follows the ledger markdown format with YAML frontmatter and a short plain-text body.
References binary content via a blob:// URI.
Uses an id/path pairing derived from the original asset location (presentation-15p/p-10).
concerns: Width and height are 0, which suggests missing or uncomputed image dimensions.
The body is minimal and does not describe the visual content of the slide.
The empty links array leaves the asset disconnected from related records within this file.
notes: A metadata ledger card for a design-source JPEG slide asset whose dimensions have not been populated.
questions: Why are the width and height values 0 for an image asset?
What visual content does presentation-15p/p-10.jpg contain?
Which consumers or downstream processes are expected to use this ground-truth record?
Is the blob reference resolvable and does it match the metadata?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a source design ground-truth image asset; the file does that as a metadata ledger entry, but the zero dimensions mean it documents the asset without derived image size.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a canonical, provenance-bearing reference record for a presentation slide image so that downstream systems can locate, verify, and treat it as a design-source ground truth.
novelty: The combination of a presentation-page image asset with a design-source channel address and a blob-backed ledger entry, plus the unusual zero-dimension metadata.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, authorship-attributed, blob-addressed ledger entry for a design-source image asset, giving a fused system a stable provenance anchor and locator for the corresponding slide image.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger markdown file recording metadata for a design-source JPEG image named p-10 from presentation-15p, including a blob reference, author session, creation timestamp, and zero width/height, with a note that it is a source design ground-truth.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and preserve provenance for a design-source presentation slide image asset.
